{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219311794D44EB638C09C33D77F"}"},"total":1294},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578404304824730393","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看的我好爽，主角好强！刀子也有点多˃ʍ˂，但是我非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常非常喜欢！！！(有种笔是写字脚是用来走路的样子…)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764486905,"group_id":"7384364999503776830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你我本无缘，全靠番茄牵o( ❛ᴗ❛ )o","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwrBc0XmwYP7S6fgIhZdmBeKv7fqm4Jj/R2LfWsQuKQA","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/899ffd2c47204711a793caf58e0b266a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702770&x-signature=TwMSXfuxQEbYmDx4FrcKcQLmBCg%3D","user_id":"2059828452662074","user_name":"AAA回收破烂谢怜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2059828452662074","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7384364999503776830","book_info":{"abstract":"（副本＋双男主＋相爱相杀＋群像＋疯子）
疯子！
虞时玖从记事起，就被人一口一口骂着疯子。
他掏了掏耳朵，对此并不回应。
什么是疯子？精神失常还是脑子有病……亦或者是，杀人？
杀人就是疯子？
虞时玖笑了。
“那这个世界上的疯子，太多太多了。”
不是只有单纯杀了人才叫杀人，诛心、诬陷、借刀杀人……都叫杀人。
当精神病院的十八岁少年逃跑后杀人又被枪毙，他死前其实是有些遗憾的。
—遗憾自己没多将那人割几刀对方就死了。
所以当虞时玖进入游戏后，睁眼时，第一眼看到的是天花板上女人血淋淋的头颅，对方那双凸出的眼珠含血望着他，撕裂嘴角朝他笑了起来。
虞时玖沉默几秒，在对方发丝垂落下时果断闭眼继续昏睡。
女人头：“……”
以至于虞时玖在试炼游戏中将诡怪心脏掏出时，玩家们炸了。
出了副本外的黎明之城秩序安稳，似乎每个人都活在平稳中。
虞时玖知道，这个世界不可能会有完全安全的地方，如果看似很安全，那么只有一个可能，眼前的新世界，更危险。
果然，这是一个连呼吸都需要收费的荒诞城镇。
不是传统无限流，除了进游戏还得活着…暂定双男主，受脑子有病，安静的时候很乖，见血的时候就emm不多说……攻正直老干部，但不圣母","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/23f9f5286c01ec28c4d0fefed3340ced","author":"岚山里","author_id":"","book_id":"7384364999503776830","book_name":"无限流：黎明游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":483,"name":"相爱相杀","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=483&name=相爱相杀&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7384396775450231358","read_count":"27028","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2433085"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1020","tags":"双男主,相爱相杀,现代,群像,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/91895274bd128e2b6cc594afdc04bfc8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363078&x-signature=7K4SPN3Zm14GC4LH87uMnXojb4Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2022734902598568","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219311794D44EB638C09C33D77F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat
